caption: A news broadcast features a group of men standing outdoors in a line during what appears to be a formal event. Nitish Kumar is identified by on-screen text as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and other individuals are labeled as "मंत्री संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार." The men are dressed in formal attire, including jackets and traditional Indian wear. In the background, a large white building is partially visible. The screen contains several news tickers and banners in Hindi. The top banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी" or "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है." A red banner across the bottom states "RJD पर नीतीश कुमार का पलटवार," accompanied by a clock showing "10:05 PM" and a channel logo. Across the sequence of frames, the visual content remains static, with the people remaining in the same positions and the on-screen text and graphics staying constant.
